summary: The diff shows modifications to 6 files for the KopdeGoa rebuild. Most existing components appear to be preserved based on the file summaries. However, QrCodeSection.tsx has been emptied to just 'export {};', which is a concern. The project_state.json shows the feature as 'pending', suggesting the rebuild may not be fully complete. A Services.tsx component appears in the file summaries but was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: QrCodeSection component must be preserved as-is without modifications
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows QrCodeSection.tsx has been reduced to just 'export {};' — an empty module placeholder — which destroys any existing component code rather than preserving it.

missing_requirements.requirement: The app is deployed and accessible
missing_requirements.reason: The project_state.json shows the feature request AR-1 has status 'pending', indicating the rebuild/redeploy has not been confirmed as completed.

hallucinated_features.description: A new Services section component was added displaying four service offerings (Home Delivery, Bulk & Event Orders, Expert Recommendations, Gift Packaging)
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summaries describe a new Services.tsx component that was not part of the original component list and was not requested. Adding new features was explicitly listed as a non-goal.
